flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 30% at Gwynedd Mercy University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.1k vs 1.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Gwynedd Mercy University rose 29% between 2006 and 2009 ($18.7k → $24.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Gwynedd Mercy University fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Gwynedd Mercy University fell 13% between 2006 and 2009 (73.7% → 64.0%).
